inputs.label: Fuel Economy Value
inputs.businessContext: The consumption or efficiency value to convert.

businessContext_i18n.en: The consumption or efficiency value to convert.

inputs.label: Source Unit
inputs.businessContext: Specify 0 if input is in km/L, 1 if in mpg.

businessContext_i18n.en: Specify 0 if input is in km/L, 1 if in mpg.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Giriş km/L ise 0, mpg ise 1 belirtin.

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for the output.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places for the output.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Dezimalstellen für die Ausgabe.

inputs.label: Gallon Type
inputs.businessContext: Select gallon type: 0 for US gallon (3.785 L), 1 for Imperial gallon (4.546 L).

businessContext_i18n.en: Select gallon type: 0 for US gallon (3.785 L), 1 for Imperial gallon (4.546 L).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Galon türünü seçin: 0 ABD galonu (3,785 L), 1 İmparatorluk galonu (4,546 L).
